  children={"Get all display information"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/displays"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve information about all connected displays including their ID, title, and frame rectangle for multi-monitor support.

  parameters={undefined}
